message:
test(resize): expand screen_state from 16 to 30 tests with resize-storm and split-boundary coverage (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New tests: rapid alt-screen cycling (resize storm simulation), redundant
smcup idempotency, 100-pane independent state tracking, exhaustive byte
boundary splits for all sequence variants (1049h, 1049l, 47h), 64KB
output with embedded sequences, clear/reset safety on nonexistent panes,
reset_context preserves alt-screen state, set_alt_screen auto-creates
pane entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
